listingdetails.name: Mayur Gardens
listingdetails.description:
Hotel Mayur Garden, located in the serene Sonapur area of Guwahati, offers a peaceful and budget-friendly stay amidst nature. Just a short distance from the Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary, it’s the ideal place for nature lovers, families, and travelers seeking relaxation. The hotel provides spacious, well-furnished rooms with modern amenities like air conditioning, room service, and free parking. Its on-site restaurant serves delicious meals, adding convenience to comfort. Guests can explore nearby attractions like the Brahmaputra River, ancient temples, and wildlife sanctuaries, making it perfect for both relaxation and adventure.

Mayur Garden is the ideal retreat for anyone wanting to experience the natural beauty of Assam without compromising on comfort. Whether you are visiting for a family vacation or a business trip, the hotel’s proximity to Guwahati city center and Sonapur’s tranquil surroundings make it an excellent choice. With attentive staff and affordable rates, Mayur Garden is known for providing great value for money.
listingdetails.description_hindi:
होटल मयूर गार्डन, गुवाहाटी के सोणापुर क्षेत्र में स्थित, प्रकृति की गोद में एक शांत और बजट-अनुकूल प्रवास प्रदान करता है। पबितोरा वन्यजीव अभयारण्य से कुछ ही दूरी पर, यह प्रकृति प्रेमियों, परिवारों और आराम की तलाश में यात्रियों के लिए आदर्श स्थान है। होटल में वातानुकूलित, अच्छी तरह से सुसज्जित कमरे हैं जिनमें आधुनिक सुविधाएं जैसे कि रूम सर्विस और मुफ्त पार्किंग शामिल हैं। होटल का रेस्तरां स्वादिष्ट भोजन प्रदान करता है, जिससे मेहमानों को आराम और सुविधा दोनों मिलते हैं। पास के आकर्षणों जैसे ब्रह्मपुत्र नदी, प्राचीन मंदिर और वन्यजीव अभयारण्यों की खोज भी की जा सकती है।

मयूर गार्डन उन लोगों के लिए एक आदर्श स्थल है जो आराम के साथ असम की प्राकृतिक सुंदरता का आनंद लेना चाहते हैं। चाहे आप पारिवारिक अवकाश के लिए आए हों या व्यापार यात्रा पर, गुवाहाटी के शहर केंद्र और सोणापुर के शांतिपूर्ण वातावरण के करीब स्थित यह होटल एक उत्कृष्ट विकल्प है। सस्ती दरों और सहायक स्टाफ के साथ, मयूर गार्डन अपने पैसे के लिए बेहतरीन मूल्य प्रदान करने के लिए जाना जाता है।
listingdetails.address: Near Sonapur Police Station, Sonapur Bazar Road, Guwahati, Kamrup (Metro) , Assam -782402, India
listingdetails.meta_title: Hotel Mayur Garden, Sonapur, Guwahati | Affordable Stay Near Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary

Located near Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary, the hotel offers comfortable rooms, a restaurant, and easy access to nature spots. Perfect for family vacations and wildlife enthusiasts. Enjoy free parking and modern amenities in a peaceful setting.

listingdetails.other_rules:
Cancellation Policy:
Guests can cancel their booking up to 24 hours prior to the scheduled check-in time without any charges. Cancellations made within 24 hours of check-in will incur a one-night stay charge. No-shows will be charged the full amount of the booking.

Check-In & Check-Out Policy:

Check-in time: 12:00 PM onwards

Check-out time: 11:00 AM
Early check-in or late check-out may be available on request, subject to availability and additional charges.

Couple Check-In Rules:

Valid government-issued photo ID and proof of relationship are required for all couples.

Guests must be 18 years or older to check in.

Unmarried couples may be asked for ID verification as per local regulations.

House Rules:

No smoking inside the rooms. Smoking is allowed only in designated outdoor areas.

Pets are not allowed inside the property.

Guests are requested to maintain decorum and avoid loud noise after 10 PM.

Children below 12 years must be accompanied by an adult.

Any damages to property or amenities will be charged to the guest’s account.

Payment Policy:

Full payment is required at the time of booking.

Accepted modes of payment: Credit/Debit Card, UPI, Net Banking, or Cash on Arrival (subject to prior confirmation).

Additional Policies:

Room service timings: 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM

Wi-Fi is free for all guests, limited to personal use.

Parking is complimentary for in-house guests only.
listingdetails.highlights: Experience a serene garden retreat surrounded by lush greenery in Sonapur, Guwahati, Assam, Stay in modern air-conditioned rooms designed for comfort and convenience in Guwahati, Enjoy complimentary private parking facilities available exclusively for all resort guests, Connect seamlessly with free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the entire Mayur Gardens property, Savor delicious meals with our on-site dining experience featuring local and international cuisine, Relax in spacious rooms equipped with modern amenities and elegant interior decor, Refresh in private bathrooms with hot water and premium toiletries provided daily, Admire scenic views of the surrounding nature and beautiful landscaped gardens, Benefit from 24-hour front desk service ensuring assistance whenever you need it, Host memorable events and gatherings in our ideal venue with professional support, Explore nearby local attractions conveniently located close to Mayur Gardens resort, Unwind in a peaceful ambience perfect for relaxation and rejuvenation in Guwahati
listingdetails.title_highlights: Serene Garden Retreat in Sonapur, Modern Air-Conditioned Rooms Available, Complimentary Private Parking Offered, Free High-Speed Wi-Fi Access, On-Site Dining Experience Provided, Spacious Rooms with Modern Amenities, Private Bathrooms with Hot Water, Scenic Views of Surrounding Nature, 24-Hour Front Desk Service, Ideal Venue for Events and Gatherings, Proximity to Local Attractions, Peaceful Ambience for Relaxation
